jsonLd.title: NSDL is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at NSDL are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSDL:
NSDL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
